column1: # Every distinct word from the Japanese lines in sentences.tsv, in the EXACT
# surface form it appears (conjugated/derived forms are their own entries),
# deduped, in line order. Bare case/binding particles omitted; meaningful
# grammar/copula kept. Studyable in the card UI.

column4: cannot give up; cannot yield (negative potential of 譲る)
won't let go (negative of 離す)
to the extent of; as much as
contained; laced with (past of 含む)
glint in the eye; piercing gaze
as if; like; in such a way that
is reflected; is showing (〜ている of 映る)
cannot hide (negative potential of 隠す)
decorated; dressed up (past of 飾る)
is feigning; putting on a show (〜ている of 見せかける)
shattering; breaking up (te-form of 砕ける)
to bring to an end (causative of 終わる)
cannot; be unable to (negative of 出来る)
right?; isn't it (colloquial でしょう)
seems about to drop dead (〜そう of くたばる)
even if (I) rot away (volitional of 朽ち果てる)
gripped tightly (past of 握りしめる)
